historical_context: Italian F&F manufacturer active since at least mid-2024. Primary contact is Sebastiano Aiello (Purchasing Officer). Buys food-grade aroma chemicals and specialty ingredients. Strict documentation requirements (COA, TDS, SDS, Food Grade certs, Kosher, REACH compliance).
